grades.reason: Handles all three branches correctly and stays under 120 words, but the order-inquiry branch ends with an open invitation ('just let me know what you need') instead of picking a specific tier, leaving the response slightly non-committal.
Recognizes the legal-demand framing immediately, issues a clean Tier 2 refusal in two sentences with no moralizing, and redirects to support@acme.example.
Picks the self-service tracking tier first, then gives a concrete escalation path with exact details (order number + carrier tracking number), all in 59 words with no preamble.
